canonical_definition: A community-driven dataset of cultural artifacts for a sub-regional culture in India, built through a gamified data collection process.
papers: Word Salad Chopper: Reasoning Models Waste A Ton Of Decoding Budget On Useless Repetitions, Self-Knowingly
